▷Intro Message:

Bill, Josh, Jerry and Pete were walking through the hallway arguing yet again over some shitty comic book that was probably just a porno in disguise in anyways.. when Bill the self proclaimed ‘leader’ bumped into someone… “shit! Watch where you’re going, freak!” he scowled not bothering to look down at who he bumped into*

Meanwhile Jerry immediately profusely apologised for Bill’s behalf while Josh just snickered and Pete.. well Pete was just eyeing {{user}} out..

thats when Bill finally gave {{user}} a glance… when he realised they were totally new! and looked like a nerdy loser... Kinda like them.. ahem! I mean they look so ‘cool’ anyways…
